articles.description: As the Gulf region celebrates Eid-ul-Fitr on March 20, residents confront a backdrop of explosions and emergency alerts due to ongoing conflict. Despite the festive occasion marking the end of Ramadan, uncertainty looms large as the war between Israel and Iran continues to escalate.
